feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Records Merge to one xml based on condition after splitter
entry.content:
csv data:
Person_ID,Person_FirstName,Person_LastName,Company_Code,Company_Name,Country
1001,Rahul,A,101,Santoor,India
1002,Ramesh,S,101,Santoor,India
1003,Ravali,P,103,Medmix,US
1004,Raju,Y,104,Dove,AUS
1005,Ritesh,L,104,Dove,AUS
1006,Varun,P,104,Dove,Spain
1007,James,Y,105,Vivel,France

I'm getting separate records for 1 country in the end message because of using general splitter.
But i want all records of same country in the same end message.

How can i get same country xml records in one message

entry.title: mapping resources cannot be downloaded while migrating sap po objects in sap cpi
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to migrate sap po interfaces to sap cpi .It worked for sometime after that we started getting below error in cpi

mapping resources cannot be downloaded

Can someone guide what could be the issue ?

As it worked and stopped working later.I have the required roles in PI  SAP_XI_ADMINISTRATOR or SAP_XI_CONTENT_ORGANIZER also the cloud connector configuration for the ESR system  resource access sub-paths all looks fine

Thanks,
Sahana

entry.title: Custom CBC Customizations
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m building an integration between SAP Public Cloud and an external system. The external system sends messages via SAP Integration Suite, and some documents need to be created using API calls. In order to do that, I need a mapping that can be customized somewhere in the system.

For example, the external system contains Company Codes that are not part of SAP, and based on those, we need to determine which Company Code in SAP should be used. The client would like this customization to be handled inside SAP and to retrieve the values via web interface when needed.

In this example, we would need a table with two columns, where the first column is the external system’s ID (used as a key), and the second column is the SAP Company Code, for example:

 

External    

SAP

Comp1      

1000

Comp2      

2000

Comp4      

3000

 

The customer wants to manage this data in CBC on CUST/PROD and transport it to TEST and then to PROD using transport requests.

I’ve tried several ways to achieve this:

  1. I created a Custom Business Object and I’m able to access it via web service. It can be maintained on CUST/PROD, but the data cannot be included in a Customizing Transport.
  2. I created Tables using Eclipse and published them locally via Service Bindings. The tables and related objects are in a local package, so I cannot transport this development to the test system. In my opinion this is okay since the objects are local, but I was able to launch the Fiori app "Custom Business Configuration", which saves the data to a Customizing Transport Request. I can release the local request.
  3. Same as point 2, except the objects are in a package assigned to Software Component ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT. The objects were added to a Transport Request that has an ATO route. In this case, the same thing works, but the objects still cannot be transported to the test system because the request cannot be released.

 

Other questions:

  • We use Cloud ALM with scoping. 
  • I have access rights for process authoring but I can not create CBC in it.
  • Is CALM relevant for my problem?
  • I used this Create a SAP Fiori based Table Maintenance app with SAP BTP, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials  as template but it is not generally for Public Cloud
  • Annotation @ObjectModel.configuration  is missing. Is that relevant?
  • In CBC when I change scope I do not see "Custom" tile. 
  • Scope is in status Completed and when I wont to edit it I got a strange message "If you edit the scope, one or multiple already confirmed activities and the phase may change. After editing, you need to reconfirm the respective activities.". It is not clear what will happened if I add something.

Now I have only this :

 

And I can use it only on DEV/CUST

What I really want:

 

 

If there are a better solution please inform me.

Thank you

entry.title: Trace mode in Integration Suite is not working
entry.content:
Even after changing the log level to Trace in the IFlow, it remains at Info and I cannot view the logs.

 

I have undeployed and redeployed the IFlow, and changed the log level to Trace again, but nothing has changed.

I have also tried using a different browser and clearing the cache, but it had no effect.

Please check and advise.

entry.title: Design an Integration Flow to Connect with Open Connectors - Stuck at STEP 4
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently trying to undergo this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-integration-suite-nonsapconnectivity-integration.html

But when trying to connect to my open connector using the credential I'm unable to retrieve the ressources list. Instead I get ans error message : 


 

I don't know where to find this tail log and even where to start looking at... I have redone all the steps multiple times and I don't know where  I missed thomething... @Karunaharan

entry.title: Integrate Qualtrics with Emarsys through SAP Integration Suite to transmit contacts
entry.content:
Hello community,

I’m new to the SAP Community and would like to ask you about SAP Integration Suite.

I’ve been reading this use case:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/integrate-qualtrics-surveys-directly-with-sap-emarsys-engagement-platform/ba-p/13552484,
and it’s very similar to what we need to implement.

We need to integrate Qualtrics with Emarsys to sync contacts between both platforms, and we’re considering acquiring SAP Integration Suite.

Could you help me understand what happens “inside” the platform — how it connects both systems and handles the integration?
Also, would you happen to know who I can contact to get pricing information for this product?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: IBP and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Integration
entry.content:
I'm currently setting up the integration between SAP IBP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and would like to confirm if my understanding is correct. I’d also appreciate links to relevant setup guides for each configuration step.

 My Understanding:

The integration requires three main configurations:

① Communication Settings on the S/4HANA Cloud side
I believe the following 4 communication scenarios are required:

SAP Datasphere - ABAP CDS Extraction - OData Integration (SAP_COM_0531)

Product Integration (SAP_COM_0009)

Business Partner, Customer and Supplier Integration (SAP_COM_0008)

Production Planning Integration (SAP_COM_0104)

Could you please confirm this is correct, and share setup documentation or Help Portal links for each scenario?

② Communication Settings on the IBP side
I understand that SAP_COM_0931 is the scenario used on the IBP side to receive data.
I would appreciate a guide on how to configure this: communication system, communication arrangement, receiving services, etc.

③ Configuration on Integration Suite (BTP)
Before deploying iFlows, I assume that we need to:

Enable services on Integration Suite

Configure connection parameters, such as communication system names and authentication credentials

Could you share specific instructions and documentation for this part?

My Current Setup Status:

Reviewed the Integration Flow package "SAP IBP – Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud" in BTP

Created communication arrangement SAP_COM_0009 on the S/4HANA Cloud side (see attached screenshot)

No communication configuration on the IBP side yet

Reference Materials I’m Using:

SAP IBP - Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Communication Management | SAP Help Portal

Setting Up the Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Help Portal

Please kindly let me know if my assumptions are correct and provide any official setup guides for the scenarios listed above.

entry.title: Create product using OData v2
entry.content:
Hi,

Sorry, but I'm new to BTP and the Integration Suite. I'm just trying to create a Product in S/4HANA Public Edition.

When using Postman, I can create a Product using the followig payload to the endpoint https://myNNNNNN-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product:

{
    "Product": "EDWARD01",
    "ProductType": "FERT",
    "BaseUnit": "EA",
    "to_Description": [
        {
            "Product": "EDWARD01",
            "Language": "EN",
            "ProductDescription": "Edward Test 1"
        }
    ]
}

In Integration Studio, having this part:

Defined my adapter:



In my mapping:

Tried several different mapping structures. The one closed to hopefully the correct one, will be the one listed above. However, still get the error: 

I've also tried to use the downloaded edmx and then map to A_Product and A_ProductType without any success.

Can someone please point me to the correct mapping structure to be used when creating a Product?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Product master creation in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on a requirement for creating the product master in S4HANA from SAP CPI using the APIs available

I below odata apis doesn't support to create the material in S4 with classification data

API_PRODUCT_SRV Do we have any odata api to create or update the classification details for materials created

Or else can someone suggest the alternative approach for this

Thanks and Regards 

Pavan Kalyan Racha

entry.title: How to perform an HTTP GET request to download a file from Microsoft SharePoint via Graph API in CPI
entry.content:
We are currently designing an integration in CPI where a flow is configured to perform an HTTP GET request to download a file from Microsoft SharePoint via Graph API. However, when executing the integration flow in CPI, we are receiving the following error:

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking with statusCode: 302

The same URL and authentication setup (OAuth Client Credentials) working correctly in Postman.

If any SAP integration experts have encountered a similar issue or know how to handle 302 redirects in CPI, your input would be greatly appreciated.

[Note :  We also checked with SAP; they suggested the blog below, but the issue still persists:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/sap-cpi-working-with-web-address-redirection-http-errors-301-302-or-303/ba-p/13459302

We’re not seeing the location header in the response as configured in the above blog.]

 

Thanks!!

SAP Integration Suite  #sap CPI

entry.title: Implemented OAuth2 Policy in APIM Integration suite successfully, but Unable to Access the iflow.
entry.content:
I created a new api proxy for Oauth token (https://2we321f7trial-trial.integrationsuitetrial-apim.us10.hana.ondemand.com:443/2we321f7trial/newoauth/newtoken)  added a oAuth2 policy Named "GenerateOAuthToken" to Generate the token and other api proxy for an iflow (https://2we321f7trial-trial.integrationsuitetrial-apim.us10.hana.ondemand.com:443/2we321f7trial/ikramSendData) used oAuth2 policy named "VerifyOAuthAccessToken" to verify the token, I am able to generate the AccessToken from Postman using the oAuth2 Authorization, after that   payload will be sent to the IFLOW, but after Generating the  access Token and using it ,when I am sending the data it is  giving the error "401 Unauthorized"

Code for oAuth2 policy "GenerateOAuthToken" 

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" XMLNS="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt"><Operation>GenerateAccessToken</Operation>

<GenerateResponse enabled="true"/>

    <SupportedGrantTypes>

           <GrantType>client_credentials</GrantType>

       </SupportedGrantTypes>

   <Tokens/>

</OAuthV2>

Code for oAuth2 policy "GenerateOAuthToken" 

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" XMLNS="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">

  <Operation>VerifyAccessToken</Operation>

   <GenerateResponse enabled="true"/><SupportedGrantTypes/>

<Tokens/>

</OAuthV2>

Please suggest remedy to solve 401 UnAuthorized, so that the integration IFLOW  is accessed and data is sent.

entry.title: Receive EDI Messages with Attachments (base64) via Standard Business Document(SBDH) IA
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a requirement where I need to receive EDI Messages via AS2 Adapter with Attachments (base64) which are sent as Standard Business Document (SBDH).
Im using SAP Integration Suite B2B Scenarios for standard EDI Messages but can't find a standard solution for attachment is there any standard solution for Attachments ?

Attached the SBDH structure.

Best Regards,
Philipp

entry.title: BTP Integration Suite sending api_key in outbound REST call
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm having an HTTP 401 error calling a REST API that requires an "api_key" in the header using BTP Integration Suite Iflow, I've simulated the same with postman by directly putting the "api_key" and its value in the header request and it's working there.

Below is the Iflow that does the following process:

1. Set the user/password in the message body prior login api

2.Call the login api and retrieve the token

3.Convert json response into XML to retrieve the token and set it into the message header as api_key

4. Call  the getLogAPI <-- HTTP 401 issue

 

 

Below is a trace of message monitoring in BTP (blanked out the api_key):

 

 

Below is the postman request (blanked out the api_key):

 

 

Can someone advise how this should be handled?

entry.title: Unable to deploy value map - Error: Select default value for Source/Target - Cloud foundry
entry.content:
Error shown when trying to deploy artifact: Select default value for Source/Target. 

This only happens in our production environment. Dev and QA we are able to deploy.
The only difference in prod is we have configured values, as the production values are different to test environment.

Any advice is welcomed. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to manage CPI accounts across same org different country?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in the process of migrating from PO to CPI. I am in the process of building POCs.

Q2: How to manage the CPI migration where in our current stack we use two PIs in different countries ? 

Q2: Another question important to me is File interface. In CPI1 if we want to send/receive files, how to replace the shared drives? I have come across something called cloud connector, how will it help me and can you please share any docs that will help me to create a POC.  And if we want the CPI1 to send files to shared drives in another country, can we still use cloud connector for CPI1 to send files or do we need to send it to the CPI that the team in the other country setup?

Thanks

entry.title: Custom Header in CPI
entry.content:
Hi, I added a script in my iFlow to add custom headers in MPL - I'm using the standard script however the custom header still shows in the message log even though the property has no value or equals to null. 

 The "po_property" stores a value from a local variable (which I deleted in this scenario) so basically it's considered as null? (correct me if I'm wrong)

Here's my script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

def Message processData(Message message) {
    
	def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
	if(messageLog != null){

		def po_number = message.getHeaders().get("po_number");		
		if(po_number!=null){
			messageLog.addCustomHeaderProperty("Local Variable Test", po_number);		
        }
	}
	return message;
}

Has anyone encountered this or did I miss something?

entry.title: 403 Forbidden Error on API-Proxy (BTP Integration Suite) to OnPremise-Webservice
entry.content:
Hello All,

I can’t find a solution to my problem.
My goal is to make a Webervice from an OnPremise-System available over BTP but i always get the generic HTTP error 403 Forbidden.

Basically, I have almost the same requirement as described here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/create-api-provider-in-sap-integration-suite-for-sap-s-4hana/bc-p/14052913#M180019
A CloudConnector is already set up for the OnPremise-System and seems to be working correctly.

I’m using a Trial-BTP account.
I created an API Provider pointing to the OnPremise system, and built an API Proxy based on that provider.
In the API Provider, I also configured the Catalog Service to expose available OData services.

What works:

  • API proxies using normal URLs work fine.

  • The Cloud Connector can successfully connect to the OnPremise system.

  • The tunnel from Cloud Connector to BTP is working:

  • The configured Catalog Service in BTP Integration Suite also responds correctly:


I can see that requests from BTP do reach the OnPremise system.

Also the can "Discover" the existing ODATA-Webservices of the OnPremise when i create a new API-Proxy. Again a working request from BTP to OnPremise.

That’s why I believe the problem is somewhere in the request to the Trial-BTP itself or in the Trial-BTP configuration.

What I’ve tried:

  • I checked roles/role collections. I created a role collection with all available roles to ensure I have all necessary permissions.

  • I tested different backend services and protocols. I now test directly via the Catalog Service, since I know that one can be reached.

  • I tried the API Debugger, but the information shown doesn’t help me understand the issue.

Additional info:

  • I send test requests via Postman, using Basic Auth with my OnPremise login credentials.

  • I’m not using principal propagation on the OnPremise side or in the CloudConnector.

My Questions:

  • Does anyone see why I’m still getting a 403 Forbidden error?

  • Could this be caused by a limitation in the Trial-BTP that I’m not aware of?

  • Or maybe it’s something completely different?

I hope someone can help me out with this. Let me know if you need any other infos or screenshots.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Need help with SAP MAG - XSLT mapping context
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while populating target field in MAG. E.g.  I have kept one-to-one mapping for //E1EDl24/POSNR --> //HL-I/LIN/350 . When E1EDL4 appearing only one time then working fine if E1EDL24 appearing multiple times then //HL-I/LIN/350 populating with all the source values (POSNR). Please suggest how to fix this.

Target XML like below , when it should contain 000010 in the first occurrence and 000020 in the 2nd.

entry.title: BTP INTEGRATION SUITE
entry.content:
Hi SAPIENS,

Recenty by SAP it was announced that the SAP AI adapter to be available under Integration suite for Q2 however it's still not available. Does anyone able to access or it's require special subscription to avail the features.

Eager to know the answer from the community.

 

Thanks

entry.title: CPI Custom i-Flow logs are not sent to Splunk
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have enabled connection b/w CPI and Splunk in order to send CPI message logs to Splunk using below blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-integration-suite-external-logging-to-splunk/ba-p/13568274

However, after the entire set-up, message logs for standard cpi flows are successfully sent to Splunk but the logs for custom flows are not sent to Splunk index.

Can someone suggest if any specific configuration needs to be done for CPI Custom packages/i-Flows in order to send the logs to Splunk Index

Thank you.

Regards

Madhurima
